name: xdm_history_file_management_overlay
description: Adds bounded history retention, explicit entry/file deletion, safe relocation and re-download, expired-URL refresh, source/destination actions, download-list transfer, and large-history optimizations.
commitMessage: Add history and file management parity
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Never delete downloaded files through automatic retention
Never export credentials, cookies, authorization headers or POST bodies
Accept only absolute HTTP and HTTPS URLs in imported lists and source actions
